default.text: ⟦⟦ Ĩñp̃ũt̃ p̃õs̃ĩt̃ĩõñs̃ c̃ãñ c̃õñf̃l̃ĩc̃t̃ ãc̃r̃õs̃s̃ t̃h̃ẽ p̃l̃ãỹf̃ĩẽl̃d̃. ⟧⟧

crossing_paths.text: ⟦⟦ P̃ãt̃t̃ẽr̃ñs̃ r̃ẽq̃ũĩr̃ẽ c̃r̃õs̃s̃ĩñg̃ b̃ẽt̃w̃ẽẽñ ĩñp̃ũt̃ r̃ẽg̃ĩõñs̃. ⟧⟧

hand_switching.text: ⟦⟦ C̃õñt̃r̃õl̃ m̃ãỹ s̃h̃ĩf̃t̃ b̃ẽt̃w̃ẽẽñ h̃ãñd̃s̃ d̃ũr̃ĩñg̃ s̃ẽq̃ũẽñc̃ẽs̃. ⟧⟧

spatial_conflict.text: ⟦⟦ S̃ĩm̃ũl̃t̃ãñẽõũs̃ ĩñp̃ũt̃ ãr̃ẽãs̃ c̃ãñ õṽẽr̃l̃ãp̃ ĩñ ũs̃ãg̃ẽ. ⟧⟧
